name: node-regenerate
title: node-regenerate
description:
Unicode-aware regular expression generator (Node.js module)
It allows you to easily generate JavaScript-compatible regular expressions
based on a given set of Unicode symbols or code points.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-regenerate because Unicode-aware regular expression generator (Node.js module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-regenerate as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-regenerate with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-regenerate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
